subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath come to pass, and the Promised One hath appeared, and from the horizon of Manifestation hath shone forth the Sun of proof and testimony. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و جاء الموعود و اشرقت من افق الظهور شمس الحجه و البرهان طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
